title: Marlow's Font
description: Font used in Marlow's cpvp pack
body:
### Main
This font is used in marlow's cpvp texture pack. It has a very nice design and it has a very sleek style.

<details>
<summary>Terms of use</summary>
Author: CrimsonFlames

**When you can use my asset:**

In modpacks on curseforge, modrinth

Any private modifications of the original resource pack.

Making a youtube video on it

**When you cannot use:**

Distribution on the Bedrock Marketplace

Locking behind a paywall

Distribution of original assets on any platforms.

**Links:**

- [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/marlow-font/)
</details>
